planningOnlyJustification: Product-to-planning pass creates planning maturity artifacts only; runtime implementation remains governed by the full-delivery chain after planning maturity.

certification.notes: Planning artifacts are present. Status remains in_progress because transition guard blocked specs_hardened promotion; no implementation certification is claimed.

completedPhaseClaims.summary: Wired SetEntityResolveServices in cmd/core (plus location_normalize/unit_convert/calculator wiring scaffolding); added entity_resolve to retrieval-qa allowed_tools; shrunk weather scenario system_prompt by 59% and added location_normalize to its allowed_tools. Authored 4 test files (microtools_prompt_contract_test.go, entity_resolve_test.go [integration], microtools_location_test.go [integration, live open-meteo], microtools_http_test.go [e2e]). Executed prompt-contract regression and entity_resolve integration tests — all PASS. SCOPE-2 prompt-delegation DoD and SCOPE-4 entity_resolve/scenario-adoption/prompt-shrink DoD items flipped with inline evidence. live integration (open-meteo) and e2e (unit_convert/calculator) tests NOT run in this pass — left as honest [ ] with uncertainty declarations in report.md.

executionHistory.summary: Bootstrapped spec from intent-driven architecture review. Defined actors, outcome contract, 7 BDD scenarios (SCN-065-A01..A07), and acceptance criteria. Hand-off: bubbles.design for design.md, then bubbles.plan for scopes.md.

Created design.md for the generic micro-tools capability foundation, including contracts for location_normalize, unit_convert, calculator, entity_resolve, SST config, observability, security, and scenario-to-test mapping. Routed implementation planning to bubbles.plan.

Created scopes.md, scenario-manifest.json, test-plan.json, report.md, and uservalidation.md for the micro-tool foundation and overlays. Artifact lint passed; transition guard blocked specs_hardened promotion due current worktree source edits, unchecked implementation DoD, missing execution evidence, dependency and retro gates, and guard-required plan detail gaps.

Mode metadata reconciliation only. spec.md declares Workflow Mode: full-delivery (authoritative owner intent set 2026-05-31); prior bubbles.plan run defensively wrote workflowMode=product-to-planning, statusCeiling=specs_hardened, planningOnly=true while operating under a planning-only workflow. Reconciled state.json to workflowMode=full-delivery, statusCeiling=done, planningOnly=false; preserved planMaturityOnly=true because planning artifacts are complete and no implementation evidence exists yet. certification.status remains in_progress; no implementation, test, or certification claims made.

SCOPE-2 + SCOPE-4 implementation pass. Wired all four micro-tools in cmd/core (entity_resolve via searchEngineEntityResolver adapter; location_normalize via open-meteo geocoder; unit_convert + calculator as deterministic CPU-only tools). Authored microtools_prompt_contract_test.go (PASS), entity_resolve_test.go integration (PASS, 2 functions / 7 sub-tests), microtools_location_test.go integration (authored; live open-meteo, not executed), microtools_http_test.go e2e (authored; not executed). Added entity_resolve to retrieval-qa-v1.yaml allowed_tools and location_normalize to weather-query-v1.yaml allowed_tools; shrunk weather system_prompt 1764→721 bytes (59% reduction, exceeds 40% Success Signal). Three SCOPE-4 DoD items + one SCOPE-2 DoD item flipped to [x] with inline evidence. Remaining DoD items left honestly [ ] with uncertainty declarations. Artifact lint PASSED.
